programme.title: E6 - 李晨體驗巧克力製作
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E7 - 05後大學生已經出來求職了
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E7 - 05後大學生已經出來求職了

programme.title: E6 - 在陪伴中成長
programme.desc: 首檔流浪動物救助情感類真人show，邀請不同領域的嘉賓們成為動物福利中心的義工，照顧流浪動物，給予它們愛心救助、治療與陪伴，最終為它們找到合適的領養人。

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E10 - 秦霄賢哈妮相擁蹦極
programme.desc: 由黃明昊、哈妮克孜、李宏毅、秦霄賢、趙小棠等嘉賓組成「探玩行動派」，以全新升級的劇情式玩法解鎖城市新風貌；他們將以最年輕、最活力的方式穿越各大城市，發揮創新的思維，創造出全新的有趣玩法。

programme.title: E228
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: E429
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E2 - The Past Recalled Once Again
programme.desc: When Tinasha stays with Oscar as his protector, she goes to investigate a magical lake where a demon beast is sealed.

programme.title: E11 - Miranda Lotto's Feelings
programme.desc: Allen is horrified that Road is a human working with the Akuma. Road attempts to kill Miranda, but fails as Allen rescues Miranda.

programme.title: E12 - And Snow Falls Over The Town
programme.desc: Road orders an Akuma to self-destruct, and Allen fails to exorcise it before it explodes. Allen is unable to kill Road, and she leaves the dimension.

programme.title: E11 - Sorcery And Magic
programme.desc: A demon, Ainswelf, appears and kills many soldiers. He calls Shion a descendant of Legreh and calls his magic 'sorcery'.

programme.title: E3 - Returning With Glory III
programme.desc: The villagers come to a new place where they can reunite with Avrora. Mogwai asks them to protect a sealing system.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E1 - Snares Islands/ Tini Heke
programme.desc: Venture to the pristine wilderness of the Snares Islands, a remote animal sanctuary protected from the turbulent sea. Hop along with a colony of Snares crested penguins, soar with giant petrels and sooty shearwaters, and roar with giant sea lions.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E3 - Stork Pack in Trouble
programme.desc: Agonize over a lost Stork pack puppy, and tussle with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, figuring out noisy-neighbor friends and foes. Hop on a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the desolate Badlands.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: E4 - Reef Wrecks of Roatan
programme.desc: This island of the coast of Honduras stands out as a vacation resort hot spot. But it’s not just the sun and sand that brings the tourists in droves. It’s actually a diver’s paradise with shipwrecks scattered from all corners of the the island.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility

programme.title: E1 - The Wilds of Winter
programme.desc: Endure winter and early spring on the west coast, where animals eke out a chilly existence. Watch red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane, welcome seal pups amid howling storms on the Inishkea islands, and view the return of the basking sharks.

programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E113
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E73 - L'isle-Sur-La-Sorgue (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she focuses on wool craftsmanship and lavender.

programme.title: E5 - At Time's Side/Forever Boguets
programme.desc: Meet Antoine Lange, one of the last Morbier clock experts in Switzerland, then enjoy a nostalgic ride with fans of vintage mopeds.

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. // After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E213 - Best Summer Ever! Part 1 / Best Summer Ever! Part 2
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: E215 - Bringing Down the House House
programme.desc: Lay Lay and Sadie volunteer to build houses for those in need, but when Sadie is put in charge of all the workers, managing Lay Lay becomes her biggest challenge.

programme.title: E116 - My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: When Henry’s crush goes on a Valentine’s date with someone else, Schwoz provides an android to make her jealous. Ray has an unpleasant date with one of Henry’s teachers.

programme.title: E408 - Pat-Tathlon / Upturn's Downturn
programme.desc: The Patricks compete in a series of games for control of the TV remote. // After driving over Patrick, a court order forces Lady Upturn to live with the Star family.

programme.title: E409 - In a Space Pickle / Stare Wars
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with the dumbest aliens in the universe. // Patrick and GrandPat have a staring contest to compete for the last lick of a baking spoon.

programme.title: E715 - An Inspector Falls
programme.desc: When Luan is cast as the lead role and detective in her school play, she ends up having to solve a real case when a mystery unfolds.

programme.title: E274 - Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Squidward hosts a secret 'We Hate SpongeBob Club' at his house.

programme.title: E115 - The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: E263 - Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: E316 - Sitting Bull / The Spies Who Love Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive. // Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! programme.title: Between Home And Hate - Undercover Among Far-Right Women
programme.desc: Right-wing extremist parties are much less popular among women than men. In Germany, one women's organization aims to change that. It offers harmless lifestyle tips alongside xenophobic messaging.

programme.desc: Philippine Secretary of Foreign Affairs Tess Lazaro on the Philippines' failed bid for a UN Security Council non-permanent seat - and how Manila is adapting its relationship with its oldest treaty ally as Washington reshapes its alliances around national interests and away from values.

programme.desc: It's a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to be the first Veggie on the Cheese Moon but half way there Evil Pea crashes into them making them crash land.

programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Laa-Laa are in Home Dome when the Tubby Phone rings. It's Dipsy and Po calling from the Tubby Mobile to say 'Hello'.

programme.desc: Zim and Zam have discovered the lost city of Micro OKIDO.

programme.title: Midnight Fly
programme.desc: Michele takes off for Europe to contemplate her inevitable divorce. She meets the beautiful Miki, a Japanese model who tries to end a relationship with a married man. There is nothing like love trouble to foster a quick bond and the women become close friends. However, during an evening of drunken revelry, Miki discloses by accident that she is the other woman of Michele's husband...

programme.title: Moon Stars & Sun
programme.desc: May's from a broken family. Her step father abused her and her mother, and even made her to be a cabaret hostess. Then she fell in love with a bank manager however the love couldn't last; Gigi's husband was in jail. She became a hostess to raise money to get him out. Her husband was out but started to cheat on her; Porsche knew her best days were over as a hostess. She had been saving money for going to US to see her daughter. One day her ex-boyfriend came back from US and...

programme.title: Running Out Of Time
programme.desc: Andy has only 14 days left in his life. He burglars a Diamond Trading Company and hence arouses the attention of a Police Negotiator, Sean...

programme.title: The Other Side Of Gentleman
programme.desc: A group of intellectuals, who all actively involved in a psychological research, assume a subject Fai, who is innocent and aimless in his life, to test if love can make him into a different person. Jo Jo is the chosen girl to carry out the mission, who attracts Fai with her elegance and beauty. At the same time, she finds herself attracted by him. She wants Professor Cheung, her boyfriend, to stop such a cruel test, but she fails. The final commitment comes when Jo Jo marries to Cheung. Fai interrupts the wedding ceremony in the church by announcing his love to Jo Jo...

programme.title: United We Stand
programme.desc: Alias “Springing Gazelle”, the renowned athlete Miss Chi Cheng is in Hong Kong helping to organize a training programme and hunt for a coach. Olivia was a former brilliant sprinter who has to give up running after her injury in a competition. At the beginning of the training, the girls are too pompous that they despise Olivia, until they find that Olivia is beyond their challenge, they adore her and are willing to go through the hardship but after a winning contest, they feel hostility towards each other and behave proudly. As a result, they lost in the competition with Singapore team. Olivia is so furious...

programme.title: Go For Broke
programme.desc: In a secluded corner of Mancheng City, a ruthless drug trafficking group stops at nothing to achieve their goals, leading to countless individuals falling into the abyss of shattered families due to drug addiction. Zhang Yao, who has been persecuted by drug traffickers to the point of losing everything, seeks revenge. He secretly collaborates with Captain An Du of the anti-drug squad to set up a ruthless trap to eliminate the top bosses of the criminal syndicate. However, behind this plan lies a carefully orchestrated game of revenge. Do they have the same enemy or do they each have their own hidden agendas? In this showdown, who is truly in control, and who is merely a pawn being manipulated? As the crisis looms, will they sink or awaken to reality? Proceed with caution as everything unfolds...

programme.title: WE 12
programme.desc: In the world, which is ordinary yet a little bit extraordinary, there is an underground organization called the 'The League of Kaito'. Their members silently guard the social order and peace. Within the organization, there are 12 geniuses, each with their own unique skills. Kaito Ian is good at planning, Kaito KT is a master of hypnosis, Kaito Stanley is skilled in eavesdropping, Kaito A.Lo is most adaptable, Kaito Edan is excellent in abseiling, Kaito Jer can instantly disguise himself, Kaito Tiger knows how to read lips from a distance, Kaito Alton is a world-class hacker, Kaito AK masters animal telepathy, Kaito Lokman is familiar with unlocking techniques, Kaito Frankie has the strongest sixth sense, and Kaito Jeremy has a natural super memory and can read and memorize large amounts of information at a glance. They are the star members of the League of Kaito. One day, they received instructions from Boss, to gather at headquarters to complete an important case that will a

programme.title: Samjin Company English Class
programme.desc: In mid ‘90s when sexual and academic discriminations were rampant, 3 young female office workers, Ja-young, Yu-nah, Bo-ram, are shunned by their company and are only given insignificant chores due to the fact that they only have high school diplomas. When a company-wide memo goes around announcing that obtaining 600 score in TOEIC could earn them a promotion, the trio and other high school grad female office workers enroll in English classes in hope of thought of finally advancing their careers. One day, Ja-young is sent to a factory in the country on an errand and by chance witnesses its waste water being poured into the river. She's convinced that the company is into shady dealings, and together with her 2 friends, they go on a hunt to find irrefutable evidence but they're on the verge of getting fired by the company trying to cover up the corruption. When the rumor of the trio's renegade action goes around, they are completely shunned by everyone there. But the female wor

programme.title: BODIES AT REST
programme.desc: A cat-and-mouse game unfolds over a single night when three armed criminals barge into a morgue, demanding the forensic doctor and his assistant to hand over a bullet lodged inside a corpse. While the criminals are in a desperate attempt to hide their true identities, the doctor finds himself sinking deeper and deeper into a quagmire as his past inadvertently catches up with him. Each explosive twist soon pushes the characters beyond their limits.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E5 - Iguana & Coconuts
programme.desc: Daniel helps tackle an alien invasion — green iguanas — in the Florida Keys and learns a down home way to prepare them. He also enjoys some fresh ways to prepare local coconuts.

programme.title: E1 - Joe and Shelley With AJ
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Joe and Shelly want a log home where they can live off the grid; real estate agent AJ helps them find their dream home.

programme.title: E5 - Iguana & Coconuts
programme.desc: Daniel helps tackle an alien invasion — green iguanas — in the Florida Keys and learns a down home way to prepare them. He also enjoys some fresh ways to prepare local coconuts.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E8 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E8 - Hard Truths of Conservation

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E5 - Iguana & Coconuts
programme.desc: Daniel helps tackle an alien invasion — green iguanas — in the Florida Keys and learns a down home way to prepare them. He also enjoys some fresh ways to prepare local coconuts.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: E1 - : A Time Of Monsters (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Through rare survivor testimony and the account of former member Hideo Shimizu, Episode 1 reveals the hidden world of Unit 731 - secret human experiments, deadly germ attacks in China and Japan's pursuit of biological weapons.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: E2 - : The Long Shadow (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: After the war, Unit 731's scientists evade justice. Families of POWs search for answers about secret medical tests, while former member Hideo Shimizu returns to Harbin to confront the past.

programme.title: E2 - Second Chances (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Inside prison walls, Christine (Awful Grace) uses art to foster healing and self-worth. Alongside her, Jamsari (BapaHebat SG) mentors fathers rebuilding their lives, proving that genuine second chances can reconnect families and inspire hope.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: E2 - After The Storm (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Cyclones and rising sea levels are destroying the coastal cities of Surabaya and Chennai. Follow the trailblazing leaders and locals working to save their cities from these looming threats.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When risk-averse Reuben Feffer's bride dumps him on their honeymoon, his life is thrown completely off track, until, a chance encounter with Polly, an adventure craving, childhood friend.

programme.title: Walking Tall (2004)
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a former soldier of the US Special Forces, returns to his hometown, where he discovers that it has been overrun by a shady casino owner and corrupt police officers.

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.

programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a former soldier of the US Special Forces, returns to his hometown, where he discovers that it has been overrun by a shady casino owner and corrupt police officers.

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E11 - Mathias Bensimon/Haider Ackermann/Salome Cousseau
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: Sale v Bristol
programme.desc: All the action from the 2025/26 Gallagher Premiership England's top level of rugby union.

programme.title: 2014 - Wales v Scotland
programme.desc: A look at some of the best matches in the history of rugby's Six Nations.

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E48

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families.
